items.title: scikit-learn: Regression metrics
items.author: scikit-learn developers
items.note: Official definitions and APIs for mean_squared_error, mean_absolute_error, and root_mean_squared_error.

items.title: The Elements of Statistical Learning (Hastie, Tibshirani, Friedman)
items.author: Hastie, Tibshirani, Friedman
items.note: Covers squared-error loss, model assessment on holdout data, and comparison to baselines in regression.

items.title: Pattern Recognition and Machine Learning (Bishop)
items.author: Christopher M. Bishop
items.note: Links squared error to Gaussian noise models and discusses error metrics for continuous targets.

items.title: PyTorch torchmetrics regression
items.author: TorchMetrics contributors
items.note: Implementations of MSE, RMSE, and MAE as torch metrics for validation loops.
